title: 04066_Unifying_Nesterovs_Accelerated_Gradient_Methods_for_Convex_and_Strongly_Convex_Objective_Functions
positive_examples: The unified AGM algorithm provides superior convergence guarantees for non-strongly convex objective functions, which can improve optimization efficiency in various applications such as machine learning and data analysis.

The framework developed in this paper can be applied to ill-conditioned strongly convex functions, which are common in real-world optimization problems, thus enhancing the performance of algorithms used in these contexts.
